arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford and Roy Keane see eye-to-eye over what move he should make next
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been told by former Manchester United captain Roy Keane that he needs to leave the club in order to revive his career, with the forward now making his preference clear

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Antony and Sterling DECISIONS, FOUR Barca deals, Pogba LATEST
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Antony and Sterling DECISIONS, FOUR Barca deals, Pogba LATEST Fabrizio Romano has delivered an update on the latest football transfer news and rumours, including big stories at Manchester United, Arsenal, Chelsea and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Manchester United LIVE: Team news and line-ups ahead of Premier League clash
arts.sum: Hosts Wolves can climb out of the relegation zone with victory over Ruben Amorim’s struggling Manchester United

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford update: Manchester United could reach January transfer window agreement with former boss
arts.sum: Fenerbahce manager Jose Mourinho reportedly wants to sign Marcus Rashford in the January transfer window, but conditions will have to be met in order to secure a reunion.

arts.ttl: Manchester United’s asking price for player emerges – January exit needs ‘something crazy’

The Dutchman scored against Tottenham Hotspur in the EFL Cup, but faile dto impress against Bournemouth at the weekend. He had scored a brace against Everton some weeks ago but has only started one league game since then. arts.ttl: Paul Pogba transfer latest as ex-Manchester United star holds January window wish
arts.sum: Manchester United's former midfielder Paul Pogba is available to play again in March 2025 after serving a reduced doping ban

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe slammed for Man Utd decision - with Chelsea showing him how it's done
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured contrasting fortunes to Chelsea this season with Sir Jim Ratcliffe accused of leaving Ruben Amorim in a difficult position to find immediate success

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Ruben Amorim's side stepping up interest in Serie A midfield ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly set to ramp up their interest in one of Serie A's finest midfielders as part of Ruben Amorim's overhaul of the playing squad.

arts.ttl: Sporting sack Ruben Amorim’s successor after just eight games
arts.sum: Joao Pereira has seen Sporting slip from six points clear at the top when he took charge to second place in the Portuguese league

arts.ttl: 'I’d love to return to Man Utd to help Ruben Amorim – he's already under pressure'
arts.sum: Jaap Stam has claimed he is open to a return to Manchester United as a coach with the club continuing to struggle, and pressure is already building on Ruben Amorim's shoulders
